case_title: LEWIS, MARILYN ADMINISTRATOR ESTATE OF THOMPSON vs. HAMERTER, GREGORY

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HAMERTER, GREGORY
